title: Anatomy of a Box Plot in R
description: A labeled diagram showing the components of a box plot created with ggplot2 and what each part represents in terms of data distribution.
relationships: The box spans from Q1 to Q3, containing the middle 50% of the data
The median line divides the box at the data's median value
The whiskers extend to the furthest data points within 1.5*IQR of the quartiles
Points beyond the whiskers are plotted individually as potential outliers
